ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var body = payload var testId = uuid() var url = body.targetUrl default "http://localhost:8888/api/health" var method = upper(body.method default "GET") var concurrency = body.concurrency default 5 var duration = body.duration default 30 var warmup = body.warmup default 0 var javaId = java!com::mycompany::perf::LoadRunner::start( testId, url, method, concurrency, duration, warmup ) --- { id: javaId, status: "running", targetUrl: url, method: method, concurrency: concurrency, duration: duration, warmup: warmup, message: "Load test started" }
